description: 3. Get IP addresses associated with an SSL certificate
examples:
Command Example
!circl-ssl-query-certificate certificate=c46fed822dadac3f31f9bb4d1a78a1d9eae4567b limitResults=10
Context Example
{
"
Hits
"
:
name: circl-ssl-query-certificate

outputs.description: The SHA-1 fingerprint of the certificate CIRCLssl.Certificate.Hits Number of hits for the certificate (number of associated addresses)
outputs.name: CIRCLssl.Certificate.SHA1

outputs.description: IP address associated to the certificate
outputs.name: CIRCLssl.Certificate.IPAddress
